  (: sequential

  (=

;;; Used to work
;;;!(assertEqualToResult
;;;  (sequential
;;;	( (add-atom &self (man mortal))
;;;	  (match &self ($A mortal) (mortal $A))))
;;;  ((mortal man)))
;; In file as:  
  !(sequential ((add-atom &self (man mortal)) (match &self ($A mortal) (mortal $A))))
;; To unit test case:
  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (sequential ((add-atom &self (man mortal)) (match &self ($A mortal) (mortal $A)))) 
    (() (mortal man)))

[

;
;; METTA-MORPH-TESTS.ADD-ATOM-MATCH.01

  (man mortal)
; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.002 secs. (2.38 milliseconds) 

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (sequential ((add-atom &self (man mortal)) (match &self ($A mortal) (mortal $A)))) 
    (() (mortal man)))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      (() (mortal man)) 
      (() (mortal man))))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_6390))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (sequential ((add-atom &self (man mortal)) (match &self ($_4316 mortal) (mortal $_4316)))) 
          (() (mortal man))) $_3974) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_4506) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3974 $_4534) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_4534)))))




  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_6390))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (sequential ((add-atom &self (man mortal)) (match &self ($_4316 mortal) (mortal $_4316)))) 
          (() (mortal man))) $_3974) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_4506) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3974 $_4534) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_4534)))))
